findings.description: Section s7 index title is 'rawWriteタグ' but the section content covers both rawWriteタグ and setタグ (as a nested subsection). The title does not reflect that setタグ is also covered in this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source has setタグ with its own anchor '.. _WebView_SetTag:' and a full attribute table (var, name, value, scope, bySingleValue). In the knowledge file, it is embedded under s7 titled 'rawWriteタグ'.

findings.description: Hints are missing attribute names 'disabled' and 'onchange', both of which appear as first-column entries in the codeCheckboxesタグ attribute table.
findings.source_evidence: Source table rows: 'disabled | XHTMLのdisabled属性。' and 'onchange | XHTMLのonchange属性。'

findings.description: Hints are missing attribute names 'value', 'autofocus', 'optionColumnName', 'disabled', and 'onchange', all of which appear as first-column entries in the codeCheckboxタグ attribute table.
findings.source_evidence: Source table rows include: 'value | XHTMLのvalue属性。', 'autofocus | HTML5のautofocus属性。', 'optionColumnName | 取得するオプション名称のカラム名。', 'disabled | XHTMLのdisabled属性。', 'onchange | XHTMLのonchange属性。'

findings.description: Hints are missing attribute name 'optionColumnName', which appears as a first-column entry in the codeタグ attribute table.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: 'optionColumnName | 取得するオプション名称のカラム名。'

findings.location: s7 (setタグ subsection within rawWriteタグ)
findings.description: Hints for s7 are missing 'value', which is a first-column attribute in the setタグ attribute table embedded in s7.
findings.source_evidence: Source setタグ table row: 'value | 値。直接値を指定する場合に使用する。name属性とvalue属性のどちらか一方を指定する。'
